languages.text: {n}Хриплый рык, срывающийся с губ Батошски, оказывается смехом. {/n} "Хах! Нет, конечно, что за глупость. Традиции на то и традиции, чтобы чтить их, соблюдать и помнить. Я буду биться с вами, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана и сразимся мы без поддавков".

{n}A rasping growl escapes Batoshski's lips, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Ha! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and upheld. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."
languages.original_text: {n}Хриплый рык, срывающийся с губ Батошски, оказывается смехом. {/n} "Хах! Нет, конечно, что за глупость. Традиции на то и традиции, чтобы чтить их, соблюдать и помнить. Я буду биться с вами, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана и сразимся мы без поддавков".

traits.locale_text: {n}A raspy growl escapes Batoshski, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Hah! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and kept. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."

{n}A raspy growl escapes Batoshski, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Hah! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and kept. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."

{n}A rasping growl escapes Batoshski's lips, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Ha! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and upheld. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."

{n}A rasping growl escapes Batoshski's lips, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Ha! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and upheld. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."

{n}A rasping growl escapes Batoshski's lips, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Ha! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and upheld. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski Lippen entfährt ein heiseres Knurren, das in lautes Gelächter mündet.{/n} "Ha! Nein, macht Euch nicht lächerlich. Traditionen sind dazu da, geachtet und aufrechterhalten zu werden. Ich werde mich Euch stellen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian, und zweifelt nicht daran, dass ich es ernst meine."
languages.original_text: {n}A rasping growl escapes Batoshski's lips, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Ha! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and upheld. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski Lippen entfährt ein heiseres Knurren, das in lautes Gelächter mündet.{/n} "Ha! Nein, macht Euch nicht lächerlich. Traditionen sind dazu da, geachtet und aufrechterhalten zu werden. Ich werde mich Euch stellen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian, und zweifelt nicht daran, dass ich es ernst meine."

languages.text: {n}Un grognement rauque s'échappe des lèvres de Batoshski avant de se muer en éclat de rire.{/n} « Ha ! Ne soyez pas ridicule. Ici, les traditions ne sont pas un vain mot. J'ai la ferme intention de vous affronter, et ne vous y trompez pas, je ne vous ferai pas de cadeau. »
languages.original_text: {n}A rasping growl escapes Batoshski's lips, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Ha! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and upheld. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un grognement rauque s'échappe des lèvres de Batoshski avant de se muer en éclat de rire.{/n} « Ha ! Ne soyez pas ridicule. Ici, les traditions ne sont pas un vain mot. J'ai la ferme intention de vous affronter, et ne vous y trompez pas, je ne vous ferai pas de cadeau. »

languages.text: {n}Un ronco gruñido brota de los labios de Batoshski, pero luego rompe a reír.{/n} «¡Ja! No, eso sería una insensatez. Las tradiciones están para honrarlas y cumplirlas. Me enfrentaré a usted, {mf|heredero|heredera} de Seberian; y no se confíe, que pienso emplearme a fondo».
languages.original_text: {n}A rasping growl escapes Batoshski's lips, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Ha! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and upheld. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un ronco gruñido brota de los labios de Batoshski, pero luego rompe a reír.{/n} «¡Ja! No, eso sería una insensatez. Las tradiciones están para honrarlas y cumplirlas. Me enfrentaré a usted, {mf|heredero|heredera} de Seberian; y no se confíe, que pienso emplearme a fondo».

languages.text: {n}Batoshski'nin dudaklarından hırıltılı bir homurtu kaçıyor, sonrasında kahkahaya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Ha! Hayır, saçmalamayın. Gelenekler, onurlandırılmak ve sürdürülmek içindir. Yüzleşeceğiz Seberian'ın vârisi. Hiç şüpheniz olmasın ki kazanmak için savaşacağım."
languages.original_text: {n}A rasping growl escapes Batoshski's lips, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Ha! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and upheld. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski'nin dudaklarından hırıltılı bir homurtu kaçıyor, sonrasında kahkahaya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Ha! Hayır, saçmalamayın. Gelenekler, onurlandırılmak ve sürdürülmek içindir. Yüzleşeceğiz Seberian'ın vârisi. Hiç şüpheniz olmasın ki kazanmak için savaşacağım."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基喉咙里挤出一声嘶哑的低吼，接着化成大笑。{/n}“哈！不，别犯傻了。传统就是用来尊重和维护的。我会跟您交手，塞贝里安的继承人。不要掉以轻心，我可是要动真格的。”
languages.original_text: {n}A rasping growl escapes Batoshski's lips, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Ha! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and upheld. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基喉咙里挤出一声嘶哑的低吼，接着化成大笑。{/n}“哈！不，别犯傻了。传统就是用来尊重和维护的。我会跟您交手，塞贝里安的继承人。不要掉以轻心，我可是要动真格的。”

languages.text: {n}バトシフスキーは、歯ぎしりしながら笑い声を漏らした。{/n}「はは！馬鹿なことを言わないで。伝統は守るべきものだ。セベリアンの継承者、君と戦って、絶対に負けはしない。」
languages.original_text: {n}A rasping growl escapes Batoshski's lips, only to dissolve into laughter.{/n} "Ha! No, don't be foolish. Traditions are there to be honoured and upheld. I'll face you, heir of Seberian, and make no mistake, I'll be fighting for keeps."

traits.locale_text: {n}バトシフスキーは、歯ぎしりしながら笑い声を漏らした。{/n}「はは！馬鹿なことを言わないで。伝統は守るべきものだ。セベリアンの継承者、君と戦って、絶対に負けはしない。」
